TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-school_Panay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yu adidi henay kami sa tayni kami i tini picudad pi picudadan sa.
S.PHON: ju adidi ħənaj kami sa tajni kami i tini piʦudad pi piʦudadan sa.
S.FORM: yu adidi henay kami sa tayni kami i tini picudad pi picudadan sa.
S.PHON: ju adidi ħənaj kami sa tajni kami i tini piʦudad pi piʦudadan sa.
S.TRANSL: 當我們小的時候,我們來學校.
When we were little, we came to school.

S.FORM: katuud ku kami u Sakizaya tayni i picudadan.
S.PHON: katuud ku kami u sakizaja tajni i piʦudadan.
S.FORM: katuud ku kami u Sakizaya tayni i picudadan.
S.PHON: katuud ku kami u sakizaja tajni i piʦudadan.
S.TRANSL: 很多我們撒奇萊雅的人來學校.
Many of Sakizaya people came to school.

S.FORM: i tawya henay sa u zazan nu nu niyam u i tiniay i Sapad haw masakayakay ku zazan.
S.PHON: i tawja ħənaj sa u zazan nu nu nijam u i tiniaj i sapad ħaw masakajakaj ku zazan.
S.FORM: i tawya henay sa u zazan nu nu niyam u i tiniay i Sapad haw masakayakay ku zazan.
S.PHON: i tawja ħənaj sa u zazan nu nu nijam u i tiniaj i sapad ħaw masakajakaj ku zazan.
S.TRANSL: 那時候我們Sapad這裡的路要爬坡.
At that time, we ascended the road.

S.FORM: ca'ay ka kaamututu ca'yay kahiyatu tu kakapah ku zazan.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj ka kaamututu ʦaʔ~ʡjaj kaħijatu tu kakapaħ ku zazan.
S.FORM: ca'ay ka kaamututu ca'yay kahiyatu tu kakapah ku zazan.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj ka kaamututu ʦaʔ~ʡjaj kaħijatu tu kakapaħ ku zazan.
S.TRANSL: 路還未鋪水泥.
The road was not paved yet.

S.FORM: u lucilucikan ku tapiingan.
S.PHON: u r~ɾuʦir~ɾuʦikan ku tapiiŋan.
S.FORM: u lucilucikan ku tapiingan.
S.PHON: u r~ɾuʦir~ɾuʦikan ku tapiiŋan.
S.TRANSL: 旁邊有很多芒草.
There was a lot of silver grass along the roadside.

S.FORM: katukuh i tini i picudadan i picudadan sa maapactu.
S.PHON: katukuħ i tini i piʦudadan i piʦudadan sa maapaʦtu.
S.FORM: katukuh i tini i picudadan i picudadan sa maapactu.
S.PHON: katukuħ i tini i piʦudadan i piʦudadan sa maapaʦtu.
S.TRANSL: 上學遲到了.
We were late for school.

S.FORM: mahiyatu nu sinsi i syopacentu nu sinsi kami i tini i pi i picudadan.
S.PHON: maħijatu nu sinsi i sjopaʦəntu nu sinsi kami i tini i pi i piʦudadan.
S.FORM: mahiyatu nu sinsi i syopacentu nu sinsi kami i tini i pi i picudadan.
S.PHON: maħijatu nu sinsi i sjopaʦəntu nu sinsi kami i tini i pi i piʦudadan.
S.TRANSL: 在教室內被老師處罰.
We were punished by our teacher in classroom.

S.FORM: u u pinanamen niyam tini i picudadan i pasibana' ku saydan sa.
S.PHON: u u pinanamən nijam tini i piʦudadan i pasibanaʔ~ʡ ku sajdan sa.
S.FORM: u u pinanamen niyam tini i picudadan i pasibana' ku saydan sa.
S.PHON: u u pinanamən nijam tini i piʦudadan i pasibanaʔ~ʡ ku sajdan sa.
S.TRANSL: 在學校我們學的是老師教的.
What we learned at school was what the teacher taught.

S.FORM: cay katineng tu cudad kyami.
S.PHON: ʦaj katinəŋ tu ʦudad kjami.
S.FORM: cay katineng tu cudad kyami.
S.PHON: ʦaj katinəŋ tu ʦudad kjami.
S.TRANSL: 因為我們不會讀書.
Because we were not good at studying.

S.FORM: mungangangangaw aca ku nipisanuhulam.
S.PHON: muŋaŋaŋaŋaw aʦa ku nipisanuħur~ɾam.
S.FORM: mungangangangaw aca ku nipisanuhulam.
S.PHON: muŋaŋaŋaŋaw aʦa ku nipisanuħur~ɾam.
S.TRANSL: 我們說的國語也不是很好.
Our Chinese was not good too.

S.FORM: amisakamu tu nu hulam a kamu sa makaynahtu nu hya nu nu saydan kami.
S.PHON: amisakamu tu nu ħur~ɾam a kamu sa makajnaħtu nu ħja nu nu sajdan kami.
S.FORM: amisakamu tu nu hulam a kamu sa makaynahtu nu hya nu nu saydan kami.
S.PHON: amisakamu tu nu ħur~ɾam a kamu sa makajnaħtu nu ħja nu nu sajdan kami.
S.TRANSL: 說的國語不好時,我們被老師罵.
Our teacher scolded us when we spoke poor Chinese.

S.FORM: tawya henay sa da'cus a misakamu tu nu Pangcah a kamu u nu mita nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: tawja ħənaj sa daʔ~ʡʦus a misakamu tu nu paŋʦaħ a kamu u nu mita nu sakizaja.
S.FORM: tawya henay sa da'cus a misakamu tu nu Pangcah a kamu u nu mita nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: tawja ħənaj sa daʔ~ʡʦus a misakamu tu nu paŋʦaħ a kamu u nu mita nu sakizaja.
S.TRANSL: 那時候,我們不能說阿美族的話還有撒其萊雅語.
At that time, we were not allowed to speak Amis and Sakizaya.

S.FORM: nu kaw nu nu hulam ku kamu sa ku ku saydan sa.
S.PHON: nu kaw nu nu ħur~ɾam ku kamu sa ku ku sajdan sa.
S.FORM: nu kaw nu nu hulam ku kamu sa ku ku saydan sa.
S.PHON: nu kaw nu nu ħur~ɾam ku kamu sa ku ku sajdan sa.
S.TRANSL: 老師說一定要說國語.
The teacher said that we had to speak Chinese.

S.FORM: ca'ay kapakapulu' u nu nu Sakizaya ku kamu u nu.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kapakapur~ɾuʔ~ʡ u nu nu sakizaja ku kamu u nu.
S.FORM: ca'ay kapakapulu' u nu nu Sakizaya ku kamu u nu.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kapakapur~ɾuʔ~ʡ u nu nu sakizaja ku kamu u nu.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)不能阻止我們說撒奇萊雅的話.

S.TRANSL: 不能阻止我們說撒奇萊雅的話.

TRANSL.notes: (They) could not stop us from speaking Sakizaya.

S.TRANSL: could not stop us from speaking Sakizaya.

S.FORM: nu Amis ku nu masaAmisay a kamu.
S.PHON: nu amis ku nu masaamisaj a kamu.
S.FORM: nu Amis ku nu masaAmisay a kamu.
S.PHON: nu amis ku nu masaamisaj a kamu.
S.TRANSL: 阿美族族人說阿美語.
Amis people speak Amis.

S.FORM: u nu mita tu u maliyuhaytu micudad i tawya henay makaynahtu nu saydan.
S.PHON: u nu mita tu u mar~ɾijuħajtu miʦudad i tawja ħənaj makajnaħtu nu sajdan.
S.FORM: u nu mita tu u maliyuhaytu micudad i tawya henay makaynahtu nu saydan.
S.PHON: u nu mita tu u mar~ɾijuħajtu miʦudad i tawja ħənaj makajnaħtu nu sajdan.
S.TRANSL: 不會讀書的我們常常被老師罵.
We who were not good at studying were scolded by the teacher.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-不會-名物化=完成貌

S.FORM: hatiza ku ni u liyuh tawya henay.
S.PHON: ħatiza ku ni u r~ɾijuħ tawja ħənaj.
S.FORM: hatiza ku ni u liyuh tawya henay.
S.PHON: ħatiza ku ni u r~ɾijuħ tawja ħənaj.
S.TRANSL: 那時候還不會.
We were not able to do it then.

S.FORM: taluma satu taluma makamelaw tu taw u nu taway tu u picudad a pi hya mi picudadan sa tayni i tabakiay a cacudadan.
S.PHON: tar~ɾuma satu tar~ɾuma makamər~ɾaw tu taw u nu tawaj tu u piʦudad a pi ħja mi piʦudadan sa tajni i tabakiaj a ʦaʦudadan.
S.FORM: taluma satu taluma makamelaw tu taw u nu taway tu u picudad a pi hya mi picudadan sa tayni i tabakiay a cacudadan.
S.PHON: tar~ɾuma satu tar~ɾuma makamər~ɾaw tu taw u nu tawaj tu u piʦudad a pi ħja mi piʦudadan sa tajni i tabakiaj a ʦaʦudadan.
S.TRANSL: 我們回家看到其他人上國中.
We went home and saw other people go to junior high school.

S.FORM: pisekingan henay ku picudad i tawya heney i.
S.PHON: pisəkiŋan ħənaj ku piʦudad i tawja ħənə i.
S.FORM: pisekingan henay ku picudad i tawya heney i.
S.PHON: pisəkiŋan ħənaj ku piʦudad i tawja ħənə i.
S.TRANSL: 那時候上國中還要考試.
At that time, we needed to take exam to enter junior high school.

S.FORM: cucong cay kahini u nu ku u nu kuocong i mahini.
S.PHON: ʦuʦoŋ ʦaj kaħini u nu ku u nu kuoʦoŋ i maħini.
S.FORM: cucong cay kahini u nu ku u nu kuocong i mahini.
S.PHON: ʦuʦoŋ ʦaj kaħini u nu ku u nu kuoʦoŋ i maħini.
S.TRANSL: 初中不像現在的國中.
Cucong was not like Kuocong now.

S.FORM: izaw ku micudaday sa mainal ku balucu'.
S.PHON: izaw ku miʦudadaj sa mainar~ɾ ku bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: izaw ku micudaday sa mainal ku balucu'.
S.PHON: izaw ku miʦudadaj sa mainar~ɾ ku bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 看到學生心生羨慕.
When I saw students, I envied them.

S.FORM: cay pakaletep ku tanga' nu mita.
S.PHON: ʦaj pakar~ɾətəp ku taŋaʔ~ʡ nu mita.
S.FORM: cay pakaletep ku tanga' nu mita.
S.PHON: ʦaj pakar~ɾətəp ku taŋaʔ~ʡ nu mita.
S.TRANSL: 我們的頭腦比不上人家.
We were not as smart as they were.

S.FORM: mahiza.
S.PHON: maħiza.
S.FORM: mahiza.
S.PHON: maħiza.
S.TRANSL: 就是這樣.
That's it!
